title: Discover the Living Art of Zhangye Danxia

scenes.text: These mountains appear to be painted by a giant brush!
scenes.query: Zhangye Danxia National Geopark zhangye danxia colors

scenes.text: This is Zhangye Danxia, located in Gansu Province, China.
The vibrant colors are formed by layers of minerals over millions of years.

scenes.text: The rock formations resemble a painter's palette.

description: 📍 Zhangye Danxia, Gansu Province - China. An otherworldly landscape that seems to leap from a canvas. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
